title: Align orchestration policy for Gemini planning, DeepSeek codegen, and Windsurf review
description: Implement multi-model phase routing in the orchestrator: Google AG for planning, local Ollama DeepSeek for implementation, Windsurf for short review tasks, and deterministic fallback to Ollama when external providers fail.
acceptance_criteria: Planning uses Google AG by default when configured
Implementation/proposal uses local Ollama models by default
Review phase uses Windsurf when configured
Any external failure falls back to Ollama without breaking task execution
Agent output includes model trace for planning/proposal/review
Local secret file ai-orchestration/.env.llm is ignored by git
